title: Environmental Health Specialist
description: Novartis is hiring an Environmental Health Specialist to support our Nashville manufacturing and quality operations. You will monitor workplace environmental conditions, conduct safety audits, ensure regulatory compliance with OSHA and EPA standards, and work with cross-functional teams to maintain our commitment to employee safety and environmental stewardship.
responsibilities: Conduct monthly environmental audits of manufacturing facilities for air quality, waste management, and regulatory compliance
Monitor exposure to chemical and biological hazards, maintaining exposure monitoring data
Prepare environmental health and safety reports for regulatory submissions and internal leadership
Coordinate safety training programs and develop standard operating procedures for hazard management
Investigate environmental incidents and recommend corrective actions
Maintain inventory of safety equipment and coordinate scheduled maintenance

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Environmental Science, Public Health, Industrial Hygiene, or related field
skills: Knowledge of OSHA, EPA, and pharmaceutical manufacturing regulations
certifications: Certified Industrial Hygienist (CIH) or Certified Safety Professional (CSP) preferred

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
On-site fitness center and wellness programs
Flexible work schedules and work-life balance initiatives
